When enabled, a WhatsApp contact button: When enabled, a WhatsApp contact button shows on every product page. Use the full international number without "+" (e.g. 8801710733329).
When enabled, customers can choose \"Pay: When enabled, customers can choose "Pay Online (SSLCommerz)" at checkout. Use the Store Password (API password), not your merchant panel login. Keep Sandbox on while testing.
When enabled, customers receive a verifi: When enabled, customers receive a verification code and must enter it to finish registration. Email signups get an emailed code; phone-only signups get an SMS code when an SMS gateway is configured under Settings → Order Notifications (otherwise they are asked to use an email). Code length and expiry are set under System Settings → General.
With auto-dispatch on, an order is sent: With auto-dispatch on, an order is sent to Steadfast automatically the first time it reaches the trigger status (e.g. Processing). Orders already dispatched are never sent twice.
